name: DC Sports
about: DC Sports offers a variety of family fun activities, with a specialization in spring and summer outdoor attractions. The venue provides year-round entertainment through indoor features, including golf simulators and indoor mini golf. Located in Wappingers Falls, NY, it emphasizes creating memorable experiences for guests of all ages with a focus on family-oriented fun and diverse activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of virtual golf games including mini golf, skeeball, and cornhole
Year-round indoor access regardless of weather

food_and_drink.notes: Food menu available, includes pizza and beverages for parties
No mention of alcohol service, BYOB not mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand not specified, but referred to as PGA Tour Simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food is allowed unless discussed with a manager prior to your party.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but it offers golf simulator sessions for various activities.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, DC Sports is described as a family-friendly venue with activities like miniature golf and kids' fun areas.
